publishedAbstract: OpenShift Container Platform on RHHI for Virtualization combines several Red Hat products to let you create and manage containers and their underlying storage. OpenShift Container Platform provides Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) infrastructure using Docker to create container images and Kubernetes for management and orchestration. Red Hat Gluster Storage provides persistent storage for containers, which is dynamically managed and orchestrated by Heketi. This technology is available as a Proof of Concept for testing purposes. It is not supported and is not recommended for production environments.
publishedTitle: Deploying OpenShift Container Platform on RHHI for Virtualization
